name: punchwall-player-state
description: Validate fresh player stat structure and HUD sync after leaderstats/RPGStats update.

args.code:
local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local player = Players:GetPlayers()[1]
assert(player, "missing player")
local leaderstats = player:WaitForChild("leaderstats", 5)
local stats = player:WaitForChild("RPGStats", 5)
assert(leaderstats and stats, "missing stat folders")
local function setValue(folder, name, value)
	local instance = folder:FindFirstChild(name)
	assert(instance, "missing " .. name)
	instance.Value = value
end
setValue(leaderstats, "Power", 15)
setValue(leaderstats, "Coins", 0)
setValue(leaderstats, "WallLevel", 1)
setValue(leaderstats, "Rebirths", 0)
setValue(stats, "FistMastery", 1)
setValue(stats, "BreakSpeed", 1)
setValue(stats, "CritChance", 5)
setValue(stats, "Luck", 1)
setValue(stats, "FistMultiplier", 1)
setValue(stats, "PetMultiplier", 0)
setValue(stats, "EquippedFist", "Starter Glove")
setValue(stats, "Pet", "None")
return HttpService:JSONEncode({ power = leaderstats.Power.Value, coins = leaderstats.Coins.Value, wallLevel = leaderstats.WallLevel.Value, rebirths = leaderstats.Rebirths.Value, equippedFist = stats.EquippedFist.Value, pet = stats.Pet.Value })

local HttpService = game:GetService("HttpService")
local Players = game:GetService("Players")
local player = Players.LocalPlayer
assert(player, "missing local player")
local gui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui"):WaitForChild("PunchWallHUD", 5)
assert(gui, "missing PunchWallHUD")
local wanted = { Power = true, Coins = true, WallLevel = true, EquippedFist = true, Pet = true, Rebirths = true }
local labels = {}
for _, descendant in ipairs(gui:GetDescendants()) do
	if descendant:IsA("TextLabel") and wanted[descendant.Name] then
		labels[descendant.Name] = descendant.Text
	end
end
return HttpService:JSONEncode(labels)
